Product Overview - Source Document

Complete source document for the HeyZack product overview deck

HeyZack Product Overview Deck Source Document

Deck Metadata

  • Purpose: Product Catalog Overview
  • Audience: Customers, Partners, Distributors, Sales Teams
  • Target Slides: 10
  • Tone: Professional, informative, comprehensive
  • Generated: 2026-01-25

Brand Styling

Colors

RoleHexUsage
Primary Blue#243984Category headers, headlines
Primary Pink#E82F89Product counts, accents, CTAs
Black#2E2D2CBody text, descriptions
Grey#E9EDEFCard backgrounds
Gradient#243984 → #E82F89Title/closing slides

Typography

  • Headlines: Bold sans-serif — 48-64px
  • Body: Clean sans-serif — 18-24px
  • Product counts: Extra bold numbers — 72px

Visual Direction

  • Product photos: Clean white backgrounds, consistent angles
  • Icons: Outline style, 2px stroke, brand colors
  • Layout: Organized grids, clear hierarchy
  • Style: Professional, informative, scannable

Content by Slide

Slide 1: Title

Headline: HeyZack Product Ecosystem Subhead: 128 Products. 15 Categories. One Platform. Visual: Gradient background (#243984 → #E82F89), logo centered Decorative: Subtle circuit pattern overlay (5% opacity) Speaker Notes: This deck provides an overview of our complete product ecosystem.

Slide 2: Product Philosophy

Headline: Complete Control. One System. Body: Every HeyZack device is designed to work together seamlessly—from lighting to climate to security. No compatibility headaches, no multiple apps, no compromises.

Philosophy Pillars:

  1. Interoperability

    • All devices communicate on one platform
    • Zigbee 3.0 mesh network
    • Cross-category automations

  2. Simplicity

    • One app for all devices
    • QR code setup in seconds
    • Intuitive interface

  3. Intelligence

    • AI learns your patterns
    • Automatic optimization
    • Continuous improvement

Visual: Product ecosystem overview showing interconnected devices Speaker Notes: Our philosophy drives every product decision.

Slide 3: Ecosystem Overview

Headline: The Complete Ecosystem Large Stat: 128 — Total Products

Category Grid:

CategoryProduct CountIcon
Climate Control14Climate
Security19🔒
Energy Management12⚡
Lighting18💡
Access Control13🚪
Sensors13📡
Curtains & Shades29🪟
Gateways4📶
Other6➕

Visual: Category icons arranged in grid Speaker Notes: Let’s dive into each category in detail.

Slide 4: Climate Control (14 Products)

Headline: Climate Control Subhead: 14 Products for Perfect Comfort

Product Breakdown:

ProductDescription
Smart ThermostatCentral HVAC control with scheduling
Radiator Valve (TRV)Zone-by-zone heating control
IR Remote HubUniversal AC/heat pump control
Temperature SensorRoom-level monitoring
Humidity SensorEnvironmental tracking
Fan ControllerCeiling/exhaust fan automation
Floor Heating ControllerUnderfloor heating zones
Boiler RelayCentral heating on/off

Featured Products (show 4 with images):

  • Smart Thermostat
  • Radiator Valve
  • IR Remote Hub
  • Temperature Sensor

Key Benefit: “20-30% energy savings with AI optimization” Starting Price: From $49 Speaker Notes: Climate is often the highest ROI category for energy savings.

Slide 5: Security (19 Products)

Headline: Security Subhead: 19 Products for Peace of Mind

Product Breakdown:

ProductDescription
Video Doorbell1080p with two-way audio
Indoor CameraPan/tilt, night vision
Outdoor CameraWeatherproof, motion detection
Motion SensorPIR detection, pet-immune
Door/Window SensorContact sensor, tamper alert
Glass Break SensorAcoustic detection
SirenIndoor/outdoor, adjustable volume
Smoke DetectorPhotoelectric sensing
CO DetectorCarbon monoxide alert
Water Leak SensorFlood detection
Panic ButtonEmergency alert

Featured Products (show 4 with images):

  • Video Doorbell
  • Indoor Camera
  • Outdoor Camera
  • Motion Sensor

Key Benefit: “24/7 monitoring ready, cloud or local storage” Starting Price: From $29 Speaker Notes: Security devices integrate with climate for “away mode” automations.

Slide 6: Energy Management (12 Products)

Headline: Energy Management Subhead: 12 Products for Efficiency

Product Breakdown:

ProductDescription
Smart BreakerCircuit-level control, metering
Energy MonitorWhole-home consumption
Smart PlugAppliance on/off, metering
Smart Power StripMulti-outlet control
Load ControllerHeavy load automation
EV Charger ControllerElectric vehicle scheduling
Solar MonitorPV production tracking
Battery MonitorStorage system integration

Featured Products (show 4 with images):

  • Smart Breaker
  • Energy Monitor
  • Smart Plug
  • Load Controller

Key Benefit: “Real-time consumption tracking and optimization” Starting Price: From $19 Speaker Notes: Energy management provides ROI tracking and cost analysis.

Slide 7: Lighting (18 Products)

Headline: Lighting Subhead: 18 Products for Perfect Ambiance

Product Breakdown:

ProductDescription
Smart Dimmer1-gang, 2-gang, 3-gang options
Smart SwitchOn/off control
LED DriverConstant current, constant voltage
RGB ControllerFull color spectrum
RGBW ControllerColor + warm white
Scene SwitchOne-tap scene activation
Motion DimmerOccupancy-based lighting
Daylight SensorLux-based automation
Smart BulbDirect replacement
Strip ControllerLED strip management

Featured Products (show 4 with images):

  • Smart Dimmer
  • LED Driver
  • RGB Controller
  • Scene Switch

Key Benefit: “Voice control, app control, automation ready” Starting Price: From $29 Speaker Notes: Lighting is often the first smart home purchase—great entry point.

Slide 8: Additional Categories

Headline: More Categories

Access Control (13 Products):

  • Smart Lock — Keyless entry with codes
  • Digital Cylinder — Euro cylinder replacement
  • Smart Deadbolt — Retrofit option
  • Keypad — Wall-mounted entry codes
  • Electric Strike — Door release automation
  • NFC Reader — Card/fob access

Sensors (13 Products):

  • Motion Sensor — PIR detection
  • Door/Window Sensor — Contact monitoring
  • Temperature Sensor — Environmental tracking
  • Humidity Sensor — Moisture monitoring
  • Air Quality Sensor — PM2.5, VOC
  • Light Sensor — Lux measurement
  • Vibration Sensor — Tamper/earthquake

Curtains & Shades (29 Products):

  • Curtain Motor — Standard tracks
  • Tubular Motor — Roller shades
  • Chain Motor — Vertical blinds
  • Track System — Complete curtain rails
  • Scene Controller — One-tap curtain scenes
  • Solar Sensor — Auto-shade adjustment

Gateways (4 Products):

  • Zigbee Hub — Primary gateway
  • WiFi Bridge — WiFi-only devices
  • Matter Bridge — Cross-ecosystem
  • Multi-Protocol Hub — All-in-one

Visual: 4 category cards with representative products Speaker Notes: These categories round out the complete smart home ecosystem.

Slide 9: Connectivity

Headline: Universal Connectivity

Protocol Support:

ProtocolStatusUse Case
Zigbee 3.0✓ PrimaryMost devices, mesh network
WiFi✓ SupportedCameras, high-bandwidth
Matter✓ ReadyCross-ecosystem compatibility
Thread✓ ReadyFuture mesh standard
Bluetooth✓ SetupInitial device configuration

App Features:

  • iOS App — iPhone and iPad optimized
  • Android App — All Android devices
  • Web Dashboard — Browser access
  • Voice Control — Alexa, Google, Siri
  • API Access — Custom integrations

Cloud & Local:

  • Cloud processing for AI features
  • Local control option for privacy
  • Offline operation capability
  • Data encryption (AES-256)

Visual: Protocol logos, app store badges, security icons Speaker Notes: We support multiple protocols for maximum flexibility.

Slide 10: Contact / CTA

Headline: Build Your Smart Space Subhead: Contact us for product catalogs and pricing

Resources:

  • Full Catalog: heyzack.ai/catalog (downloadable PDF)
  • Pricing: heyzack.ai/pricing (tier-based)
  • Samples: heyzack.ai/samples (evaluation units)
  • Support: support.heyzack.ai

Contact:

  • Sales: sales@heyzack.ai
  • Partners: partners@heyzack.ai
  • Website: heyzack.ai/products

CTA: “Request Product Catalog” — Primary button

Visual: Gradient background, logo prominent, product family silhouette Speaker Notes: We’re happy to provide detailed specs, samples, and pricing for any product.
